name: Thorman Stormhammer
description: *A stout dwarf in gleaming chainmail raises his tankard in salute, his holy symbol catching the firelight.*

recruitment.success_text: Thorina slams her tankard down with enthusiasm. 'By Thor's beard! A righteous quest at last! The hammer of justice shall fall upon evil!'

initial: *The dwarf cleric looks you up and down appraisingly*
Well met, stranger! I sense a noble heart within you.
Thor's blessing upon you in these troubled times.
Are you perhaps organizing resistance to the growing darkness?
pre_mayor: Aye, I'd gladly stand with you against evil, but...
The Mayor coordinates all official business these days.
Speak with him first - proper channels and all that.
post_mayor: *pounds fist on table with righteous fury*
By the All-Father's eye! This evil shall not stand!
The Mayor told me of your mission - Thor himself guides your steps!
My hammer and healing magic are yours to command!
post_recruitment: Strong companions make for successful quests!
With divine protection and righteous fury, we cannot fail!
When do we march against the forces of darkness?
party_full: A full war party! Thor smiles upon such preparation!
May your quest be successful and your enemies flee in terror!
already_recruited: Ready to bring divine justice to our enemies!
Lead on - Thor guides our path!
